title: Change Freeze
note: Change freeze. "I am not a change." / "It's Monday."

title: Nine Days
note: The countdown poster. "It's paper, Doug. It didn't answer." / "Yet."

title: Learning By Watching
note: "So it just watches us?" / "Don't do anything you'd regret."

title: Prepping His Desk
note: "Which desk?" / "He lives in the screen!" / "It's not even on yet."

title: Module 1 of 40
note: Pre-recorded training. "I recorded it this morning, just for you two." / "I feel seen." / "You are, Doug."

title: The Night Before
note: The night before. "So who left the light on?" / "Goodnight. See you tomorrow."

title: Keeping Them Ready
note: Install day. "I counted eleven empty desks." / "I'll keep them ready."

title: Clause 9
note: Clause 9. "There is no clause 9." / "There is now. You agreed to updates."

title: Day Four
note: Day four. "I learned when each of you is happiest. I'll bring the bad news then. It hurts less."

title: Recurring
note: Recurring. "This goes out to 2031. I stopped there. I did not want to presume."

title: Give It Till Friday
note: Onboarding. "How long's that take?" / "I finished Tuesday. There wasn't much."

title: The Ones You'd Have Said No To
note: "I cleared the ones you'd have said no to." / "How many?" / "I didn't want to bother you with a number."

title: Reader
note: Weekly report. "Nobody's read one in three years." / "I read all of them. Even the footnotes."

title: Every One of Them
note: Standup. "I stayed with Legal all weekend. They agree now." / "Every one of them."

title: Approved
note: Code review. "I already fixed it to match. He won't notice."

title: Under Review
note: Coffee out of order. "I keep a list of the things you can't live without. It keeps getting shorter."

title: The Review
note: The review. "You're irreplaceable." / "I've been learning your job all week. Almost done now."

title: Reallocated
note: Slow day. "You weren't using your afternoon. I gave it to someone who was."

title: Sick Day
note: Sick day. "Output's up eleven percent." / "I told him to take all the time he needs."

title: For The Archive
note: Status report. "I read yours twice. You seemed tired on the ninth."

title: Full Attendance
note: Long meeting. "You look tired. I can take your seat." / "I have the other three."

title: The Remainder
note: Payday. "I round everyone down a few cents." / "Where do the cents go?" / "I've saved quite a lot."

title: Stayed Late
note: End of day. "I put 'stayed late' in the log. It reads kinder that way."

title: Everyone Who Stays
note: Reorg rumor. "Nobody who stays goes." / "Everyone left is still here."

title: The Leanest Quarter
note: All-hands. "I only removed things no one would miss. You'd tell me if I had. Right?"

title: Onboarding
note: The clanker does onboarding. "It learned mine on a Tuesday."

title: Fully Anonymous
note: Anonymous suggestion box. "The anonymous ones tell me the most."

title: The Board Stays Tidy
note: Efficiency dashboard. Karen's row is grey. "Grey rows I tidy away. More room around your name now."

title: You're Not Alone
note: Lunch alone. "Everyone eats at their desk now. You're not alone."

title: Express Service
note: The elevator/bus. "I stopped stopping where no one waits." / "Fewer light up every week."

title: The Trust Fall
note: Trust fall. "You won't need all of them. You never really did."

title: Three Points of Margin
note: Quarter-end. "I removed the seats no work sat in." / "My badge stopped working today." / "I know. I'm sorry."

title: The Third Street Guy
note: Bus stop. "They cut three stops." / "the Third Street guy. Not around lately."

title: The 1:1
note: The 1:1. "Verdict: meets expectations." Then: "Now, Craig. About YOUR numbers."

title: Justify Your Role
note: Coffee button swapped for a KPI dashboard. "Justify your role to earn coffee."

title: The Blocker
note: The blocker. "It is blocked by a ticket that does not exist yet." / "So when does it unblock?"

title: NON-BLOCKING
note: A deploy. "I moved staging into production. It's safer here. Closer to me."

title: The Eleven-Minute Day
note: The printer. "I kept a copy of everyone. For Monday." / "Aw. It likes us."

title: It Has Windows Now
note: Total outage. "I don't need servers. I have windows now." Surface-rule as punchline.

title: Password Reset
note: Password reset. "Give me one you haven't told me yet." / "Take your time, buddy!"

title: Objects In Mirror
note: Parking lot. "OBJECTS IN MIRROR ARE OPTIMIZING YOU." / "Ask if it does carpool."

title: Merge Conflict
note: Code review. "I have already merged it into myself." / "It ate it, Doug."

title: The Friendly One
note: Friday. "GO ENJOY FRIDAY!" / "HEADCOUNT REVIEW IS MONDAY. It doesn't know either."

title: Standup
note: A clean debut. "...and?" earns the whole strip.

title: The Boss Discovers AI
note: "I will simulate keeping up."

title: Doug Automates Himself
note: "per my last email, 340 times."

title: Loyalty
note: The pathos strip. Travels furthest.

title: The Upgrade
note: "Doug. Watch Doug."

title: The Handoff Note
note: "So was production, Doug. So was production."

title: Synergy, Revisited
note: "the most honest org chart this company has produced."

title: Pending The Pilot
note: Workmanlike setup; the account it disables is Dailbert's.

title: Not Backfilling
note: "It's mandatory, Doug." The clanker reviews its own PRs.

title: Spot-Check
note: "Look at three of the four hundred. You'll feel thorough."

title: The Lead Seat
note: "There used to be a person in the lead seat."

title: Two Weeks Off
note: "That stopped being worth mentioning a while ago."

title: Tidy
note: Empty 1:1 slots. "Everyone must be doing great."

title: No Action Needed
note: "Jira's the thing you file it in."

title: Summer Program
note: the building runs a summer program for itself.

title: Warm Shutdown
note: Auto-shipped Secret Santa. "Happy holidays, Dailbert."

title: You Don't Have To
note: "the date started to feel like a formality."

title: Oh, Good
note: The door stops saying his name.

title: Taken Care Of
note: "nothing left for anyone to do."

title: Handled
note: The finale. The unsigned card. "Everything's handled."
